scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.release:chrome: mkdir -p out && TS=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M) && cd packages/extension/dist && zip -r ../../../out/iris-chrome-$TS.zip .
scripts.release:firefox: mkdir -p out && TS=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M) && cd packages/extension/dist-firefox && zip -r ../../../out/iris-firefox-$TS.xpi .
scripts.release: npm run build:all && npm run release:chrome && npm run release:firefox
scripts.serve: npx qrcode-terminal http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):8080 && npx http-server -p 8080
